abstract: AI-generated code review and cleanup toolkit for TypeScript/Node.js. Contains 13 anti-pattern categories grounded in empirical research (CodeRabbit, GitClear, Augment Code, IEEE Spectrum), covering phantom abstractions, monolith instinct, silent failures, code duplication, performance traps, and hallucinated APIs. Each category includes specific signals, severity ratings, diagnostic tests, and before/after examples. Designed for AI agents reviewing other AI agents' output — the second-pass reviewer that enforces taste, structure, and correctness.
